description: TAM baseline: anchor PGD on opt_step trajectory iterate (anchor_step=2) instead of data_sample. Identical to q218 (pgd_delta=1.5, 3 PGD steps, GC loss) except the PGD center is now x_anchor from 2 opt_step unrolls. Validates that (a) anchor moves away from x_pos (anchor_dist > 0), (b) neg_dist is ~1.5 from x_pos (not 25-45), (c) mse_neg_final > mse_neg_init. If neg_dist collapses to < 0.1, trajectory is not moving (reduce anchor_step or increase pgd_delta). SUCCESS: val MSE < 0.00969 at 100k AND anchor_dist in (0.2, 5.0).
notes: TAM baseline. Key diagnostics in TAM-GC-DIAG: anchor_dist should be >0 (trajectory moves), neg_dist should be ~1.5 (PGD radius from x_anchor, not far from x_pos), pgd_disp should be ~pgd_delta (PGD saturates). mse_neg_final > mse_neg_init (PGD ascends). If successful, proceed to q221 sweep over anchor_step and pgd_delta.
